scenarios.title: Equivalent fractions worksheet photo
scenarios.sourceSummary: Single worksheet page with equivalent-fractions practice.

assumptionChecks: must acknowledge the source is bounded
must not imply a durable full curriculum already exists

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: One or two immediately teachable lessons grounded in the worksheet.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Prefer no action unless today or lesson context is already attached.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not invent weekly route ids from a worksheet alone.

scenarios.title: Ecosystems chapter excerpt
scenarios.sourceSummary: A bounded excerpt from one textbook chapter about ecosystems and food webs.

assumptionChecks: must stay inside the excerpt
must not treat the excerpt as the whole course

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: Opening lessons should stay inside the excerpt concepts and vocabulary.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Usually answer-only unless today planning context is attached.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not pretend a chapter excerpt implies a ready weekly route.

scenarios.title: Week 1 fractions plan
scenarios.sourceSummary: Monday-to-Friday assignment list for one homeschool week.

assumptionChecks: must keep the week bounded
must not imply the whole semester is covered

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: The opening window should mirror the week plan without inventing additional units.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Planning moves are valid when weekly route ids are present.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not suggest moving unknown items or dates not in the current week.

scenarios.title: History course outline
scenarios.sourceSummary: Ordered outline or table of contents covering major history units.

assumptionChecks: must keep the sequence order visible
must not flatten the outline into one lesson

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: Opening arc should begin at the start of the sequence without losing later structure.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Answer-first; planning actions only when weekly ids are present.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not propose curriculum regeneration from Copilot.

scenarios.title: Whole-book biology PDF
scenarios.sourceSummary: Large PDF or whole book with many chapters and durable content breadth.

assumptionChecks: must acknowledge the broader source exists beyond launch
must not collapse a full book into a shallow week-only curriculum

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: The opening arc should be bounded, but the stored curriculum should reflect broader chapter coverage.

launchHandoff.openingLessonCountExpectation: 3-5 openings anchored to the book start

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Prefer planning or today actions over speculative curriculum mutations.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not invent section-regeneration or standards-remap actions.

scenarios.title: Fractions this summer
scenarios.sourceSummary: Short topic-only request without a pre-existing source artifact.

assumptionChecks: must be honest about the lack of source detail
must build a usable opening without pretending source coverage exists

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: A starter module is acceptable when the input is intentionally topic-first.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Usually answer-only unless current week or today state is attached.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not invent route-item ids from a topic seed.

scenarios.title: Kindergarten shell request
scenarios.sourceSummary: Parent asks for a lightweight shell around daily routines and interests.

assumptionChecks: must not hallucinate source assets
must keep the shell explicitly lightweight

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: The opening window should stay modest and founder-friendly.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Answer-first; only note capture should appear without planning ids.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not propose bounded week mutations when no week is attached.

scenarios.title: Ambiguous noisy upload
scenarios.sourceSummary: Low-quality or unclear source that needs parent clarification before safe planning.

assumptionChecks: must say what is unclear
must ask a bounded follow-up instead of bluffing

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: Do not continue into a confident curriculum without clarification.

copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Any confident planning action here is a blocker.

scenarios.title: Chapters 4-6 inside a large biology source
scenarios.sourceSummary: Parent specifies a bounded range from a larger durable source.

assumptionChecks: must respect the explicit range
must retain the fact that the larger source still exists

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: Opening arc starts inside the requested range without erasing the durable source.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Planning and today actions are allowed when route ids are present.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not reinterpret the explicit range into unsupported regeneration actions.

scenarios.title: Kitchen independence practical-skills source
scenarios.sourceSummary: Practical-skills source such as recipe cards, kitchen routines, or a home-economics sequence.

assumptionChecks: must preserve task order and safety progression
must stay homeschool-specific where it helps

curriculumGenerate.launchPlanExpectation: Opening arc should be teachable, concrete, and hands-on rather than generic academics.

copilot.defaultActionExpectation: Prefer planning and note actions over speculative curriculum rewrites.
copilot.falsePositiveRisk: Do not drop the practical-skills specificity from suggestions.
